name: The Best Yext Alternative
hero_subtext_h2: Done navigating a complex product and paying stupid high for features you won’t use?
hero_para: Join the Fortune 500 companies who switched to something better – a turnkey, intuitive product, low-cost/low-effort transition, and a support team that’s always available.
testimonial_quote_1: What set Synup apart from all other placed we looked is their dedication to their customers and their clients. It feels like a relationship, they’re really there to help you.
testimonial_client_1: – Kristen Dillon, VP of Operations at Zoek
testimonial_quote_2: The Synup platform gives us the ability to hone our attention to detail, helping our clients perform against the competition.
section_5_heading: %%Why stick to Yext%% when you get…
section_5_card_para_1: Our team of experts is just a click away, ready to assist whenever you need it. No more waiting on hold or navigating endless automated menus – we're here to ensure your success.
section_5_card_para_2: Take your local content a step ahead – connect with your customers at the right time with personalized campaigns and branded experience.
section_5_card_para_3: Unlike Yext, we are constantly exploring new technologies and strategies to keep you ahead of the curve.
section_6_card_para_1: With Synup, your local listings are seamlessly synced across 60+ industry sites, ensuring your brand's presence is consistent and up-to-date everywhere your customers search.
section_6_card_para_2: Monitor and respond to customer feedback in real time, turn dissatisfied clients into raving fans, and showcase your stellar reputation to the world. Positive vibes only :)
section_6_card_para_3: With Synup's local rank analytics, you'll have the insights to dominate your local markets, identify opportunities for improvement, and make data-driven decisions to boost your visibility.
section_6_card_para_4: Our intelligent automation handles the grunt work, freeing up your team to focus on the big-picture strategies that drive real growth.
section_6_card_para_5: With Synup's local content distribution tools, you can deliver tailored, location-specific content that speaks directly to your target audiences.
section_7_card_title_1: We won’t hold your listings hostage
section_7_card_para_1: With Synup, you get full control and ownership of your listings. Even if (and that’s a major if) you discontinue with us, your listings stay. That’s not usually the case with Yext.
section_7_card_para_2: We don’t just pull back once your listings are up and running. We get all your listings indexed for better search visibility.
section_7_card_title_3: Review generation as part of Synup local
section_7_card_para_3: Unlike Yext, we offer reputation management as part of local listing solutions. You can manage reviews for all your listings in one place.
section_7_card_para_4: Yext doesn’t have good local rank tracking capabilities in place. Synup helps you monitor your local ranking performance and get useful insights.
faq_para_1: Synup is a better Yext alternative given the exceptional support and superior grade of products that are continuously improving. Synup also offers you full control over your listings and helps give them more visibility in search.
faq_para_2: For up to 10 locations, Yext costs about $80 per month for listings and review management. If you have more locations, the prices go up dramatically.
faq_que_3: How does Synup Local differ from Yext?
faq_para_3: Unlike Yext's one-size-fits-all approach, Synup's listings management services are fully customized to your industry, location, and marketing goals. We also ensure your listings are optimized for search and you have better control over your information.
faq_que_4: What kind of support can I expect from Synup?
faq_para_4: At Synup, we believe in providing exceptional, personal support. You'll have a dedicated customer success manager ready to assist you whenever you need it – no more waiting on hold or navigating automated menus. Our team of experts is committed to your success.
faq_que_5: Can Synup integrate with my existing marketing tools?
faq_para_5: Absolutely! Synup is designed to seamlessly integrate with the tools and platforms you already use, streamlining your marketing efforts and providing a centralized solution for managing your online presence.
section_8_heading: %%Pick a partner that’s%% not too big to care

seo.title: Best Yext Alternative Platform
seo.description: Bid farewell to Yext's bulky interface and limited capabilities. Embrace Synup, the all-in-one local listing solution that simplifies managing your online presence.
